product_overview: LearnAI converts dense documents (PDFs, papers, guides) into AI-synthesized lesson scripts and cinematic narrated videos, with integrated quizzes and a course management dashboard to track learner progress.
core_goals: Automate extraction of core concepts and generation of lesson scripts from uploaded documents.
Produce cinematic, narrated videos from lesson scripts using Remotion and AI voice synthesis.
Enable instructors to edit AI-generated scripts and persist changes.
Provide interactive quizzes tied to videos to validate comprehension.
Offer a dashboard for course and video management and user progress tracking.

features.name: AI Document Synthesis
features.description: Ingest a PDF and produce a structured curriculum with extracted topics, lesson titles, scripts, and visual prompts using Gemini as primary AI and Groq as fallback.
user_flows: Navigate to /upload -> If not authenticated, get redirected to /auth/login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Redirect back to /upload -> Upload a PDF file -> Enter course title -> Select learning level -> Click Start Processing button -> Wait for AI analysis -> See extracted topics and scripts listed -> Click Create Course button -> See success confirmation and redirect to /courses

Navigate to /upload -> Upload a PDF file larger than allowed or a corrupted file -> Enter course title -> Click Start Processing button -> Wait for AI analysis -> See processing error message describing the failure -> See suggestions to retry, reduce file size, or contact support

features.name: AI Script Editing
features.description: Allow users to review, edit, and save AI-generated lesson scripts on the lesson page so scripts can be tuned before video production.
user_flows: Navigate to /lesson/[id] -> Click on a lesson topic in the lesson list -> See script preview in the editor panel -> Edit script content in textarea -> Click Save Script Changes button -> See 'Saved successfully' toast -> See updated script reflected in preview

Navigate to /lesson/[id] -> Click on a lesson topic -> Edit script content in textarea -> Click Save Script Changes button -> See validation or save error message -> Click Retry Save -> See either success or persistent error and option to view logs or contact support

features.name: Video Generation (Cinematic Video Lessons)
features.description: Generate full AI-narrated cinematic videos from finalized lesson scripts using Remotion with customizable voice and theme settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /lesson/[id] -> Click Customize Voice and Theme -> Select voice option -> Select visual theme -> Click Produce Full AI Video button -> See job queued modal with progress indicator -> Wait for rendering to complete -> Navigate to /video/[id] or /videos -> Click Play on the generated video -> Hear AI narration and see AI-generated visuals

Navigate to /lesson/[id] -> Click Produce Full AI Video button -> See progress spinner -> See error 'Rendering failed due to browser memory limits' -> See recommendation to shorten lesson or retry on a machine with more resources

features.name: Interactive Quiz
features.description: Automatically generate and present quizzes based on lesson or video content, score submissions, and provide feedback to learners.
user_flows: Navigate to /video/[id] -> Click Select Quiz tab -> Read question 1 -> Select answer for question 1 -> Click Next -> Complete all questions -> Click Submit Quiz button -> Wait for scoring -> See final score and detailed feedback -> See links to revisit corresponding lesson sections

Navigate to /video/[id] -> Click Select Quiz tab -> Answer some questions -> Click Submit Quiz button with unanswered questions -> See validation warning to complete all required questions -> Complete remaining questions -> Click Submit Quiz button -> See final score and feedback

features.name: PDF to Lesson Script
features.description: Converts uploaded PDFs into structured lesson topics and scripts

features.name: AI Script Editing
features.description: Edit and save AI-generated lesson scripts

features.name: Video Generation
features.description: Render cinematic videos from lesson scripts with AI voiceovers
user_interactions: Click Produce Full AI Video button

features.name: Interactive Quiz
features.description: Take tests based on video content

known_limitations.impact: Large videos may cause browser lag or memory issues
